calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Dec-04-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Petitioner Suzanne K. Jackson.

Ms. Stoneman explains Petitioner's efforts to locate any heirs. Petitioner's counsel confirmed that an investigator was hired to conduct a search, using Mr. Castle's Social Security information among other resources to verify the deceased's lack of heirs. Counsel stated that no living heirs were found. The court waives the mischaracterization of the amendment to the attorney costs as a "supplement." The court takes the matter under submission with intent to grant.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Continued To Nov-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman appeared by zoom for Suzanne Jackson.

Discussion was held with respect to how the codicil fits in with the 2016 will, conversations that counsel had with the petitioner, the long term relationship the petitioner had with the decedent and how well she knew him, the thought that the decedent was referring to the lifetime gift he made to the charity, the only asset of the estate being a house with a reverse mortgage on it, there being four executed transfer on death deeds, but never having been recorded, the decedent being a do it himself kind of person, an heirship search not having been done, the decedents parents being deceased, the brother being deceased with no children, the petitioner never hearing the decedent talk about any family members, etc. The court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 30, 2016 and the codicil dated July 23, 2018 are admitted to probate. Suzanne K. Jackson is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 10, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.
